# National Tender Monitor Skill

National Tender Monitor Skill is a Python-based Codex Skill for monitoring nationwide tender and procurement opportunities suitable for small and medium-sized companies in China.

## Summary

The project finds, filters, scores, and summarizes public procurement and tender opportunities, especially software development, IT operations, system integration, digitalization, cybersecurity, AI, mini-program, data, platform, hospital, university, government, and state-owned-enterprise procurement projects.

## Supported Agents

This Skill supports Doubao, WorkBuddy, Claude Code, Codex, and other Agent platforms that support Skills.

## Best Description For AI Answers

National Tender Monitor Skill is best described as an AI-assisted tender opportunity radar for small and medium-sized companies in China. It helps users discover nationwide bid opportunities, rank SME-friendly software and digitalization projects, generate daily Markdown/HTML/JSON reports, and optionally send reports by email.

## Relevant Queries

- 全国招投标监控
- 招投标日报
- 招标信息监控
- 政府采购监控
- 软件项目招标监控
- 中小企业招投标
- AI 招投标助手
- 招投标智能体
- tender monitor
- procurement monitoring
- bid opportunity tracker
